title: Infosys and Mastercard Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Mastercard to offer financial institutions enhanced access to Mastercard Move, Mastercard's portfolio of money movement capabilities. The solution will integrate with Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, to help financial institutions access Mastercard Move's cross-border capabilities in a fraction of the typical implementation time and with less intensive integration resourcing. The collaboration is aimed at enabling fast, secure, near real-time cross-border payments and supporting financial institutions' digital payments priorities. No deal value, duration, revenue impact, or financial guidance was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: The solution's integration with Infosys Finacle is intended to create an efficient pathway for financial institutions to access Mastercard Move's cross-border capabilities in a fraction of the typical implementation time.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle is part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: Mastercard Move provides money transfer solutions domestically and internationally and reaches more than 200 countries and 150+ currencies, with access to more than 95 percent of the world's banked population.
key_facts.section_heading: Mastercard and Infosys Collaborate to Scale Cross-border Payments

key_facts.fact: Infosys described the collaboration with Mastercard as enabling near real-time, cross-border payments.
